steps.title: Translate the yearly change
steps.content: Each year, the account increases by $0.62\%$ of its previous value. That means each new value is the previous value multiplied by $1+0.0062$, or $1.0062$.

steps.title: Classify the model
steps.content:
Repeated multiplication by the same factor is exponential. Since the factor is greater than $1$, the value increases over time.
The answer is C.
